title: tephrosia forbesii subsp. forbesii
intro: Tephrosia forbesii subsp. forbesii, also known as Forbes' bean or Tephrosia, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia forbesii subsp. forbesii include its potential to alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its role in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia forbesii subsp. forbesii can be made from its leaves, stems, or roots, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
